creator: jim@phrantic.phear.net
text:
On Sat, 21 Nov 1998 FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:

> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >Synopsis:       new port: xgirc-0.1.1
> >Arrival-Date:   Sat Nov 21 01:20:01 PST 1998
>  

Fixed Makefile as per Vanilla's request.  The diff is below..

*** Makefile.orig       Sun Nov 22 00:18:52 1998
--- Makefile    Sun Nov 22 00:06:39 1998
***************
*** 13,19 ****
  
  MAINTAINER=   jim@phrantic.phear.net
  
! BUILD_DEPENDS=        gtk-config:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk
  
  GNU_CONFIGURE=        yes
  WRKSRC=               ${WRKDIR}/XgIRC-0.1.1
--- 13,19 ----
  
  MAINTAINER=   jim@phrantic.phear.net
  
! LIB_DEPENDS=  gtk.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk
  
  GNU_CONFIGURE=        yes
  WRKSRC=               ${WRKDIR}/XgIRC-0.1.1

Jim
